data_coverage_summary: Tink API has public documentation that indicates open-banking data and consent workflows across accounts, balances, transactions, consents. Public API docs.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for financial-account connectivity, consent, and payment-initiation workflows rather than telemetry or operational asset use cases. Tink should be treated as a rest api surface for open-banking data and consent workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Tink API indicates Public API docs. The documented surface aligns with open-banking data and consent workflows and covers accounts, balances, transactions, consents. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates open-finance workflows for account access, balance and transaction retrieval, consent management, and payment initiation.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Tink API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as open-banking data and consent workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
